featuredProduct.label: Featured Product
featuredProduct.headline: Live eBay Store
featuredProduct.summary: SpammKing TCG currently completes live purchases through eBay. A specific featured product will be added here once the listing, price and product photography are verified.

latestEbayListing.label: Latest eBay Listing
latestEbayListing.headline: SpammKing TCG eBay Store
latestEbayListing.summary: Current public buying activity is routed through the SpammKing TCG eBay store while direct website checkout is not live.

latestArrival.label: Latest Arrival
latestArrival.headline: Stock arrival not published yet
latestArrival.summary: No public stock arrival, purchase or grading submission has been verified in the website content yet. This slot should be updated when a real arrival is ready to share.

cardOfTheWeek.title: Card of the Week to be selected
cardOfTheWeek.population: No population figure published until verified from a reliable grading source.
cardOfTheWeek.summary: The first Card of the Week will be added once Sean chooses a real card from his own collection.
cardOfTheWeek.whyCollectorsLoveIt: This section is reserved for collector-led commentary based on a real owned card, without unsupported market or population claims.

businessUpdates.title: Collector content system added
businessUpdates.summary: A new content system now powers homepage highlights, business updates, Card of the Week and milestone content from one JSON file.

businessUpdates.title: Business email addresses added
businessUpdates.summary: SpammKing TCG now uses dedicated business inboxes for general, customer support, orders and trade enquiries.

businessUpdates.title: Release calendar refined
businessUpdates.summary: The release hub now acts as a collector release-watch calendar rather than a promise of confirmed stock.

businessUpdates.title: Trade information page prepared
businessUpdates.summary: A hidden distributor information page is available for trade and supplier applications.

milestones.title: Website launched
milestones.summary: The first public SpammKing TCG website went live through GitHub and Cloudflare Pages.

milestones.title: Trade information page prepared
milestones.summary: A hidden noindex trade information page was created for distributor and supplier conversations.

milestones.title: Business email connected
milestones.summary: Dedicated contact addresses were added for customers, orders and distributor enquiries.

milestones.title: Collector content system launched
milestones.summary: Homepage highlights, business updates and Card of the Week content became data-driven.
